_cronNote: Vercel Hobby (free) tier caps at 2 cron jobs. Only add an entry when src/app/api/cron/<name>/route.ts EXISTS. Historical entries '/api/cron/alerts' and '/api/cron/prices' were removed 2026-06-28 because their route handlers were deleted (returned stale 'last run' warnings via BijakBeli Cron Watchdog).
